boosts.name: Advanced Training
boosts.description: Once per Round, when a Friendly Support Unit activates a Special Ability that costs CP, resolve that ability with its CP cost reduced by 1 (to a minimum of 0). Do not Exhaust this card.

boosts.name: Speed on Creep
boosts.description: If the active Friendly Zerg Unit is ON CREEP, increase its Speed characteristic by 1.

boosts.name: Living Glob of Tissue
boosts.description: Creep Tumor tokens have STAY IN PLAY and DISPLACEMENT.

boosts.name: Creep Removal
boosts.description: If an Enemy Unit ends a Move, Deploy, Run, Charge or Disengage action Within 1" of a Friendly Creep Tumor token, remove that token from the battlefield.

boosts.name: Vehicle Weapons
boosts.description: The active Mechanical Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gain CRITICAL HIT (1).

boosts.name: Vehicle Plating
boosts.description: Use before a Friendly Mechanical Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.

boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!
boosts.description: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!
boosts.description: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

boosts.name: Armed and Ready
boosts.description: The active Biological Unit Deploys from any table edge that is not a player's Entry Edge. No model may be placed Within 10" of any Enemy model. This ability cannot be used if another Friendly Biological Unit has already been Deployed this Round.

boosts.name: Go! Go! Go!
boosts.description: The active Biological Unit performs a 2" Move action. This does not count towards its action limit.

boosts.name: Let's Have a Blast!
boosts.description: The active Biological Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gain ANTI-EVADE (1).

boosts.name: Mass Recall
boosts.description: Once per Game. Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield. All Friendly Protoss Units Within 6" of this Faction Indicator are removed from the battlefield and placed in Reserves.

boosts.name: Dae’Uhl
boosts.description: When a Friendly Unit receives Damage, reduce the Total Damage by 2 (to a minimum of 1).

boosts.name: Strap in!
boosts.description: The active, Unengaged Ground Unit is placed in Reserves instead of performing an action.

boosts.name: Ready For Dust-off
boosts.description: Place a Faction Indicator anywhere on the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. At the End of the Round, the controlling player may Deploy one Ground Unit from Reserves in base-to-base contact with this Faction Indicator.

boosts.name: Infantry Weapons

boosts.description: Use before a Friendly Unit makes an Armour Roll. That Unit gains TOUGH (1) for this roll.

boosts.name: Missile Attacks
boosts.description: The active Unit’s first Ranged Weapon used gains PRECISION (1).

boosts.name: Omega Network
boosts.description: If there is no Friendly Omega Worm on the battlefield, place a Friendly Omega Worm Unit anywhere on GROUND LEVEL of the battlefield, more than 10" away from any Enemy model. This Round, the Omega Worm is not eligible to use its Special Abilities (excluding Structure).

boosts.name: Wild Mutation
boosts.description: If the active unit is ON CREEP, the Unit gains BUFF Speed (1) and its first Weapon used gains PRECISION (1).

boosts.name: Zerg Creep
boosts.description: During Army Building, select exactly one Creep Card and add it to their Army List, paying its listed cost (if any).

boosts.name: Pylon Warp-In
boosts.description: If there is no Friendly Pylon on the battlefield, place a Friendly Pylon Unit anywhere on the GROUND LEVEL of the battlefield more than 10" away from any Enemy model. This Round, the Pylon is not eligible to use its Special Abilities (excluding Structure).

boosts.name: Bound by the Khala
boosts.description: At the end of the active Unit’s Activation, select one other Friendly Unit eligible to Activate in the current Phase. Immediately Activate that Unit.

boosts.name: Ready for Pickup?
boosts.description: Once per Game. The active Unit resolves the PLACE (12) effect. Models placed by this effect cannot be set up Within the Engagement Range of any Enemy Unit. This resolves instead of performing a standard action.

boosts.name: Timing Push

boosts.name: Additional Supply Depots
boosts.description: The active Unit’s Supply Value is improved by 1 for Controlling and Contesting Mission Markers and completing objectives.

boosts.name: Tactical Retreat
boosts.description: The active Unit ignores the Disengage penalty for the remainder of the Round.

boosts.name: Terran Tenacity
boosts.description: Once per Game. Immediately claim the First Player Marker. No other player may claim the First Player Marker for the remainder of this Phase.
